reviews.comment:
Excelente. Siempre buena atención.
Lo único es que al ser solo dos estaciones en la ciudad,  siempre hay mucha gente haciendo fila para cargar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. Always good service.
The only downside is that, since there are only two stations in the city, there are always long lines to recharge.

(Translated by Google)
I give the food at this beautiful place 5 stars!!! If you go to this beautiful place, the cappuccinos are delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWT2NsUkZNbXBwVWxZM1JEaG9la2QwWDIxaFNuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Le doy solo 2 🌟 xq la atención malisima. Hay filas de más d 2 cuadras esperando ser atendidas y los empleados colocan el picó en un vehículo y se apoyan en el auto hasta terminar de atender a ese cliente cuando podrían ir atendiendo a otros clientes mientras se termina de llenar el tanque de otro vehículo. No saque foto x una cuestión de códigos, pero lamentable la atención. Y a la gente no le queda otra que esperar. Empleados de la playa un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
I'm only giving it 2 stars because the service is terrible. There are lines of more than two blocks waiting to be served, and the employees put the pump on one vehicle and lean against the car until they finish serving that customer, when they could be serving other customers while another vehicle's tank is being filled. I didn't take a picture due to code of conduct, but the service is appalling. And people have no choice but to wait. The gas station staff are a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKUU5uaFZSRWd6TFU1WVJWVnpZMW96VW5KMFZGRRAB
